betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Advanced Oil Processing§f covers late-game petroleum equipment for maximum fuel efficiency.

§eTask Requirements:§f
• §bCatalytic Reformer§f - Upgrades low-value petroleum to high-quality products
• §bCatalytic Converter§f - Required catalyst item for both machines
• §bHydrotreater§f - Desulfurizes petroleum fluids

§eCatalytic Reformer:§f
• Power: §e400 kHE/s§f | Input: 2000 mB/s
• Converts Naphtha → §bReformate§f + Petroleum Gas + §bLiquid Hydrogen§f (byproduct)
• Requires §bCatalytic Converter§f in GUI as catalyst

§eHydrotreater:§f
• Power: §e200 kHE/s§f | Input: 1000 mB/s
• Desulfurizes Crude Oil/Cracked Oil using §bPressurized Liquid Hydrogen§f
• Outputs desulfurized fluids + §bSour Gas§f (for sulfur)
• Also requires §bCatalytic Converter§f in GUI

§eCatalytic Converter Crafting:§f
§bPVC bars§f + §bCobalt powder§f + §bBismuth ingots§f

§aSynergy:§f Reformer produces hydrogen → pressurize → feed to Hydrotreater → desulfurized oil → refinery → more naphtha → back to Reformer. Closed-loop efficiency!
